title: VaultErrorEnvelope
description: The `opensks.vault-error.v1` failure envelope emitted (with a nonzero exit) on any encryption/decryption error. Carries no plaintext.

VaultErrorCode.description: Stable error codes for the `vault encrypt` / `vault decrypt` failure contract.

VaultErrorSchemaTag.description: A one-variant tag enum so the error `schema` field serializes to the exact literal `"opensks.vault-error.v1"`.
